selectedSlice: Turn the Global Admin failed-export attention path into a real filtered Archive / Exports follow-up list backed by current package requests.
selectionReason: Current repo evidence showed a real protected-workspace gap: the Admin Command Center already surfaced failed export counts and exposed the Global Admin-only Archive / Exports section, but that section still rendered only counts and snapshots, leaving export-failure follow-up summary-only. The current admin dashboard route already had the data shape and permission boundary needed to return redacted current export rows, so extending the existing section into a real filtered worklist was the safest bounded product-readiness batch.
candidateShortlist: Global Admin archive export follow-up worklist
Broader Global Admin route refresh across Audit, Programs, Students, Presentation, and Users & Access
userFacingImprovement: Global Admins can now open the failed-export attention row into a real Archive / Exports follow-up list with current failed package requests, while the section also exposes in-progress and complete requests.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: The slice reuses the existing Global Admin-only admin dashboard route and Archive / Exports section instead of adding a new route.
Recent export rows stay redacted and do not expose Drive ids, storage keys, tokens, or other secret-bearing metadata.
No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor-assignment, or student-privacy boundary changed, and mentor-meeting follow-up remains summary-only.

validation.notes: Focused workspace syntax, admin-dashboard route proof, workspace coverage, and dashboard-action verification passed before docs/state closeout. The full validation ladder also passed after the closeout files were updated.

deferred: Broader Global Admin route refresh remains larger than this bounded archive follow-up slice.
Admin mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise current destination.
Program Teacher mentor-meeting follow-up still lacks a precise scoped destination.
Hosted section-level permission proof still needs allowed hosted runtime and audit-event writes.
Review Queue missing-submission semantics remain deferred until backend rows or exact scoped empty-state evidence exist.
Viewer email visibility policy still needs a product decision before any UI change.
Mentor reassignment and removal workflow still needs mutation and audit design.
nextRecommended: Continue the bounded Global Admin route refresh only where the current workspace can prove an exact destination; otherwise keep mentor-meeting follow-up summary-only and move to the next proven route-backed gap.
doNotRepeat: Do not regress the new Archive / Exports follow-up list back to count-only summary cards while the admin dashboard route already returns safe current export rows.
Do not invent an Admin mentor-meeting drill-down until a real exact destination exists.
Do not broaden Global Admin archive follow-up into site-scoped sections that still require an explicit selected-school contract.
